stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which of the following statements is true regarding the aspect ratios of the wings depicted in the annex?

options.a: B has a higher aspect ratio, but A produces less wing tip vortices.
options.b: A has a higher aspect ratio, but B produces more wing tip vortices.
options.c: A has a higher aspect ratio, but B produces less wing tip vortices.
options.d: B has a higher aspect ratio, but A produces more wing tip vortices.
